record.field:
{'body': [{'patch': '+@432:Calendar View: View all maintenance requests in a calendar format to get a clear picture of scheduled and pending maintenance tasks.
  • ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-07-03T05:39:13.764597', 'revision_id': 119, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@34:Employee Management and Cost Analysis 👩‍💼💸 R@36:Take care of your equipments R@38:Business expansion 🚀📈Marketing Campaigns R@317: app. Then, schedule one or several "Invoicing Schedule" activities on the sales order with the aim to never forget to send an intermediary invoice in order to sustain your cash flow.

    🎓Activities
     +@391:


    Employee Management and Cost Analysis 👩‍💼💸


    At the core of any appointment scheduling system is effective employee management. With Odoo's Employee  module, you can easily manage your staff's profiles, roles, and schedules. This includes:


    • Creating Employee Profiles: Add detailed information about your employees, including their roles, contact information, and skills.
    • Scheduling: Plan and manage work schedules, ensuring that your team is always aware of their responsibilities.
    • Leave Management: Handle holiday requests and track leave balances effortlessly, ensuring that your business operations continue smoothly even during peak vacation seasons.


    🎓Employee', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-07-03T05:36:29.763362', 'revision_id': 118, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '+@193:

    1. Manage Vendors and Pricing:
      • Vendor Management: In the Contact app, manage all your preferred vendors. Set reminders for minimum order amounts to benefit from free transport costs.
      • Adjust Margins: Navigate to the Product app to set up your pricing rules. Adjust margins according to your business needs. Use the Purchase app to fine-tune vendor details and bulk pricing options.
    +@236:
    1. Efficient Management:
      • Automations: Set up automated actions to create activities when certain conditions are met, like stock falling below a certain level. Click on the Automations icon (the gear icon) and configure your triggers and actions.
      • Vendor Relationships: Maintain efficient relationships with your vendors by setting up contact details and reminders in the Contact app. This ensures timely communication and smooth operations.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-07-03T05:35:54.758470', 'revision_id': 117, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@20:Centralize all the important information 📝 R@22:Keep an eye on your fitness center's inventory 📦 R@24:Automate Your Reordering Process 🚀 R@26:Customize and Monitor Your Inventory 📊 R@28:Transition to Point of Sale and eCommerce 📈 R@30:Invoice at the right time 📈 R@32:Resources management  R@34:Appointment Scheduling/Management R@36:Employee Management and Cost Analysis 👩‍💼💸 R@38:Take care of your equipments R@40:Business expansion 🚀📈Marketing Campaigns +@117:

        Need to set up automated actions? No problem! Easily create activities when elements move from one stage to another (just click on the ⚙️ icon and set up your automations).


        Opportunity didn't pan out? No worries! You can mark it as lost, understand why, and analyze where it went wrong. Learn and improve with every opportunity.


        Save time by directly sending automatic quotations to your customers via email. The personalized email provides:


        • The quotation in PDF format. ( You can custom it in settings/technical/email/email templates)
        • A link to view the online quotation, where the customer can confirm and sign it.


        +@136:

        Centralize all the important information 📝


        Starting a fitness journey requires handling numerous important documents such as membership contracts, workout plans, maintenance schedules, and vendor agreements. Instead of scattering them across emails, storage services, or your computer, attach them in the chatter, and they will be automatically centralized in the Documents app. 

        🎓Documents

        Speed up the sign process thanks to the Sign app. Once again, all the signed documents will be stored in the Documents app.

        🎓Sign', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-07-03T05:30:26.530253', 'revision_id': 116, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@10:

        R@92:🎓  CRM R@159:🎓 Sales R@175:🎓Documents R@190:🎓Sign R@270:🎓Inventory R@337:🎓Purchase R@367:🎓Point of Sale R@393:🎓 eCommerce R@417:🎓Activities R@426:🎓 Invoicing R@493:🎓Appointment R@538:🎓Employee R@600:🎓Maintenance R@652:🎓Marketing R@656:🎓Emailing', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-07-02T12:08:27.778347', 'revision_id': 115, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@190:

        🎓 Sign -@192', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:47:40.262672', 'revision_id': 114, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@175,176 +@178:

        🎓 Documents

        R@189,192:

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:46:59.398743', 'revision_id': 113, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@173,174', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:46:19.605233', 'revision_id': 112, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@39,42', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:37:36.864625', 'revision_id': 111, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@412:🎓Activitie +@421:
        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:37:14.743267', 'revision_id': 110, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@412:        🎓Activities', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:36:46.117242', 'revision_id': 109, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': "+@646:

        With Odoo's powerful marketing tools, you can streamline your marketing efforts, engage more effectively with your audience, and drive business growth. Transform your marketing strategy with Odoo and watch your business soar!

        ", 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:35:39.427930', 'revision_id': 108, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@436:

        Managing appointments effectively requires a robust resource management system that can handle various elements seamlessly. Odoo offers comprehensive solutions for employee management, appointment scheduling, and resource allocation, ensuring your operations run smoothly. Let’s explore how Odoo manages appointment management, making it efficient and user-friendly.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:30:23.549058', 'revision_id': 107, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@436:

        Managing appointments effectively requires a robust resource management system that can handle various elements seamlessly. Odoo offers comprehensive solutions for employee management, appointment scheduling, and resource allocation, ensuring your operations run smoothly. Let’s explore how Odoo can revolutionize your appointment management, making it efficient and user-friendly.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:29:53.477146', 'revision_id': 106, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@418: to the invoicing policy set on delivered quantities, the generated invoice is always the reflect of the reality on the field and it is fair for the customer. ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:28:26.166887', 'revision_id': 105, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@172:🎓 Documents', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:25:36.792553', 'revision_id': 104, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@545,549:

        Ensuring your equipment is always in top-notch condition is crucial for smooth operations. Odoo's Maintenance app provides a comprehensive solution for managing all your maintenance needs. From defining equipment to creating maintenance requests and assigning repair tasks, Odoo simplifies every aspect of maintenance management. Let’s dive into how Odoo can transform your maintenance processes.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:24:38.494713', 'revision_id': 103, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@500,504:

        At the core of any appointment scheduling system is effective employee management. With Odoo's Employee  module, you can easily manage your staff's profiles, roles, and schedules. This includes:', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:24:19.374168', 'revision_id': 102, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@368,372:

        Setting up your POS system is a breeze. Simply navigate to the POS app, configure your cash register, and customize your product listings. The system supports various payment methods, making it convenient for your customers to complete their purchases. Plus, you can generate detailed sales reports to keep track of your daily, weekly, and monthly performance.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:24:01.520443', 'revision_id': 101, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@357,361:

        Of course, all of this functionality is extendable to your POS system. With Odoo's integrated POS app, you can set up a cash register, manage sales transactions, and track inventory in real-time. This means that as soon as a sale is made, your stock levels are updated automatically, ensuring you never run out of popular items.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:23:44.788447', 'revision_id': 100, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@341,345:

        Now that we've covered inventory and vendor management, let's dive into how you can extend all of these features to your Point of Sale (POS) system and seamlessly link it to your website for a complete eCommerce solution.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:23:40.708713', 'revision_id': 99, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@145,149:

        Once confirmed, the quotation becomes a sales order. All quotations and sales orders are centralized in the Sales app.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:23:18.960767', 'revision_id': 98, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@378,382:

        Setting up your online store is as easy as customizing a few settings. Go to the Website app, choose your theme, and start adding your products. You can offer various payment options, manage shipping methods, and even set up automated marketing campaigns to boost your sales. With real-time inventory updates, your customers will always know what's available, enhancing their shopping experience.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:22:47.219082', 'revision_id': 97, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@66,70:

      • The website app has a contact form that already redirects the people that fill the form directly to the ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:22:35.150149', 'revision_id': 96, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@388 -@390 R@397,398:🎓 Invoicing', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:22:15.588919', 'revision_id': 95, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@387,388:

        🎓 Activities', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:21:39.246384', 'revision_id': 94, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '+@356:

        But why stop at in-store sales? Easily extend your sales capabilities to your online store with Odoo's eCommerce app. 

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T11:17:52.725055', 'revision_id': 93, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': "R@282:: Add bulk pricing options for vendors to save on large orders. R@289:Track and Analyze +@295:
      • Analytic Distribution: For each ordered item, fill in the analytic distribution to track which product will be used where. This helps in budgeting and cost analysis.
        • +@322:

        Efficiently manage your inventory and vendor relationships with ease using Odoo's comprehensive tools. Keep your fitness center running smoothly and profitably by leveraging automation and customization features. 🚀💪

        -@324,325", 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T10:02:29.198141', 'revision_id': 92, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@257:Inventory', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T10:00:31.043839', 'revision_id': 91, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@257,258', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T10:00:07.844518', 'revision_id': 90, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@186:

        Selling food and consumables at your fitness center? Automate your reordering process to ensure you never run out of stock. Choose from different vendors and add bulk pricing options, saving you time and hassle. Easily manage your margins and make adjustments as needed to stay profitable.

        🎓 Inventory

        Before starting the day, ensure you have enough stock. Confirming an order triggers the creation of a delivery in the Inventory app, where you can check the stock levels of each needed product. If stock levels are too low, resupply the items from the Purchase app by creating a purchase order linked to the right vendor. R@188,256:

        In the Contact app, you can easily manage all your preferred vendors and set reminders for minimum order amounts to benefit from free transport costs. For each ordered item, don't forget to fill in the analytic distribution to track which product will be used where. R@259,326:

        🎓 Purchase

        Easily adjust your margins by customizing the products and vendors. Navigate to the Product app to set up your pricing rules and adjust the margins according to your business needs. Use the Purchase app to fine-tune vendor details and bulk pricing options.

        Efficiently manage your inventory and vendor relationships with ease!', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:59:44.920556', 'revision_id': 89, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@183:

        Selling food and consumables at your fitness center? With Odoo, you can automate your reordering process, ensuring you never run out of stock. Here's how to make the most of Odoo's inventory management features:

        Automate Your Reordering Process 🚀

        1. Set Up Automatic Reordering:
          • Navigate to the Inventory App: Go to the Inventory app in Odoo.
          • Create Reordering Rules: Click on the Products menu and select Reordering Rules. Here, you can set minimum and maximum quantities for each product to trigger automatic reordering.
          • Choose Your Vendors: Select the vendors you want to reorder from. You can also add bulk pricing options to save time and money.
        1. Check Stock Levels:
          • Confirm Orders: When an order is confirmed, a delivery is automatically created in the Inventory app. This allows you to keep track of stock levels and ensure you have enough inventory for your daily operations.
          • Resupply as Needed: If stock levels are low, create a purchase order from the Purchase app. Link it to the right vendor to ensure timely replenishment.
          1. Manage Vendors and Pricing:
        • Vendor Management: In the Contact app, manage all your preferred vendors. Set reminders for minimum order amounts to benefit from free transport costs.
        • Adjust Margins: Navigate to the Product app to set up your pricing rules. Adjust margins according to your business needs. Use the Purchase app to fine-tune vendor details and bulk pricing options.

        Customize and Monitor Your Inventory 📊

        1. Product Setup:
          • Navigate to the Product App: Go to the Product app and select the products you want to customize.
          • Set Up Pricing Rules: Adjust the pricing rules and margins to align with your business strategy.
          • Bulk Pricing: Add bulk pricing options for vendors to save on large orders.
        1. Track and Analyze:
          • Analytic Distribution: For each ordered item, fill in the analytic distribution to track which product will be used where. This helps in budgeting and cost analysis.
          • Inventory Adjustments: Make inventory adjustments as needed. Go to the Inventory app and select Inventory Adjustments to update stock levels manually.
        1. Efficient Management:
          • Automations: Set up automated actions to create activities when certain conditions are met, like stock falling below a certain level. Click on the Automations icon (the gear icon) and configure your triggers and actions.
          • Vendor Relationships: Maintain efficient relationships with your vendors by setting up contact details and reminders in the Contact app. This ensures timely communication and smooth operations.

        Efficiently manage your inventory and vendor relationships with ease using Odoo's comprehensive tools. Keep your fitness center running smoothly and profitably by leveraging automation and customization features. 🚀💪 -@185,205', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:59:05.184418', 'revision_id': 88, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@260,261 -@275,276 -@283,284 -@295,296 -@303,304 -@313,314', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:58:14.982720', 'revision_id': 87, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@24:Transition to Point of Sale and eCommerce 📈 R@26:Invoice at the right time 📈 R@28:Resources management  R@30:Appointment Scheduling/Management R@32:Employee Management and Cost Analysis 👩‍💼💸 R@34:Take care of your equipments R@36:Business expansion 🚀📈 R@38:Marketing Campaigns R@183:

         

        Selling food and consumables at your fitness center? Automate your reordering process to ensure you never run out of stock. Choose from different vendors and add bulk pricing options, saving you time and hassle. Easily manage your margins and make adjustments as needed to stay profitable.

        🎓 Inventory

        Before starting the day, ensure you have enough stock. Confirming an order triggers the creation of a delivery in the Inventory app, where you can check the stock levels of each needed product. If stock levels are too low, resupply the items from the Purchase app by creating a purchase order linked to the right vendor. R@185,305:

        In the Contact app, you can easily manage all your preferred vendors and set reminders for minimum order amounts to benefit from free transport costs. For each ordered item, don't forget to fill in the analytic distribution to track which product will be used where. +@306:

        🎓 Purchase

        Easily adjust your margins by customizing the products and vendors. Navigate to the Product app to set up your pricing rules and adjust the margins according to your business needs. Use the Purchase app to fine-tune vendor details and bulk pricing options.

        Efficiently manage your inventory and vendor relationships with ease!', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:57:53.758300', 'revision_id': 86, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@66,70:

      • The website app has a contact form that already redirects the people that fill the form directly to the CRM in the lead tab. R@73:

        Never miss nor forgot an opportunity. The R@150:

        +@151:

        Streamline your operations and provide an exceptional experience for your fitness center members with our comprehensive solution.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:55:07.746285', 'revision_id': 85, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@33,38 -@484,486', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:49:09.202134', 'revision_id': 84, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@478 +@480:

      • Email marketing: Create beautiful, responsive email templates with Odoo. Personalize your email content based on customer data. Use dynamic content blocks to tailor messages', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:49:01.330348', 'revision_id': 83, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@483:Create beautiful, responsive email templates with Odoo.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:48:46.964087', 'revision_id': 82, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@481,483:
      • Email marketing', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:48:29.118681', 'revision_id': 81, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '+@482:
      • Feed
        • ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:48:08.599486', 'revision_id': 80, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@481,483:

      • ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:48:01.797610', 'revision_id': 79, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': "-@481,483 +@493:

        Marketing email and feeds

        Master Email Marketing with Odoo 📬📈 Odoo's email marketing tools are designed to help you create stunning campaigns that drive engagement and conversions. Here's how you can make the most of them:

        Customize your emails

        Drag-and-Drop Email Builder: Create beautiful, responsive email templates with Odoo's intuitive drag-and-drop builder. Customize your emails to match your brand's identity without any coding skills. Personalized Campaigns: Personalize your email content based on customer data. Use dynamic content blocks to tailor messages to different segments, ensuring relevance and boosting engagement. Automated Email Sequences: Set up automated email sequences to nurture leads and guide them through the sales funnel. Trigger emails based on specific actions, such as signing up for a newsletter or abandoning a cart. A/B Testing: Optimize your email campaigns by testing different versions. Experiment with subject lines, content, and CTAs to see what resonates best with your audience. Advanced Analytics: Track the performance of your email campaigns with detailed analytics. Monitor open rates, click-through rates, and conversions to measure success and make data-driven decisions. Keep Your Audience Engaged with Feeds 📣📰 Stay top-of-mind with your audience by delivering relevant content through Odoo's feed management tools:

        Content Feeds: Create and manage content feeds that keep your audience informed and engaged. Share blog posts, news updates, and promotions directly from your Odoo platform. RSS Integration: Integrate RSS feeds to automatically pull in content from your favorite sources. Keep your website or app updated with fresh content without manual effort. Social Media Feeds: Display your social media feeds on your website to showcase your latest posts and activities. Increase your social media following and engagement by making your feeds easily accessible. Push Notifications: Keep your audience informed about new content or important updates with push notifications. Drive traffic to your website or app and increase user engagement. Custom Feeds: Create custom feeds tailored to your audience's interests. Segment your audience and deliver content that is most relevant to them, enhancing their experience and satisfaction. With Odoo's email marketing and feed management tools, you can build stronger relationships with your audience, increase engagement, and drive more conversions. Harness the power of Odoo to supercharge your communication strategy and watch your business thrive!


        ", 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:47:51.989439', 'revision_id': 78, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': "+@492:

        Effective communication is the backbone of any successful business. With Odoo's robust tools for email marketing and feed management, you can stay connected with your audience, nurture leads, and keep your customers engaged.

        -@494,497 -@507,508", 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:43:44.511015', 'revision_id': 77, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@500,501 -@504,506', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:42:43.796937', 'revision_id': 76, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@493,499:

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:42:12.898211', 'revision_id': 75, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@493,495', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:41:55.192231', 'revision_id': 74, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@488:🎓Marketing  +@489:
        -@491,492', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:41:40.990282', 'revision_id': 73, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@488:        Marketing ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:41:11.158119', 'revision_id': 72, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@488,489', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:40:24.910415', 'revision_id': 71, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@486,487', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:40:21.253977', 'revision_id': 70, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@446:

        Marketing Tools  R@456,458:

        #### Create and Manage Marketing Campaigns 📅📊 R@468,481:

        - **Marketing Campaigns**: Design comprehensive marketing campaigns that include email marketing, social media posts, and other outreach activities. Plan your campaigns in advance and track their performance in real-time.

        - **New Posts**: Create engaging content for your social media channels directly from Odoo. Schedule posts to be published at optimal times and ensure consistent engagement with your audience.

        - **Automated Flows**: Set up automated marketing workflows that trigger specific actions based on customer behavior. For example, send a follow-up email after a purchase or a reminder for an abandoned cart.

        - **Integration with Social Media**: Link your Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and other social media accounts to Odoo. Manage all your social media activities from one centralized platform.

        - **Analytics and Reports**: Measure the success of your marketing efforts with detailed analytics and reports. Understand what works best for your audience and refine your strategies accordingly.

        - **Customer Segmentation**: Segment your customers based on various criteria such as purchase history, engagement level, and demographics. Tailor your marketing messages to different customer segments for better results.


        ---

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:39:33.192708', 'revision_id': 69, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@444:

        Business expansion  R@446,447:


        ### Boost Your Business with Odoo's Comprehensive Marketing Tools 🚀📈

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:37:58.904009', 'revision_id': 68, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@440,441 -@444,491', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:37:33.289741', 'revision_id': 67, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@265,269:

        Before generating an intermediary invoice in the Invoicing app, freeze the project status in the Project app to get an overview on the progress in terms of:

        • Time spent on the project.
        • Materials purchased.
        • Materials sold.

        All these components will give you an accurate overview on the project profitability.

        Thanks to the invoicing policy set on delivered quantities, the generated invoice is always the reflect of the reality on the field and it is fair for the customer. ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:36:53.446405', 'revision_id': 66, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@26:Resources management  R@28:Appointment Scheduling/Management R@30:Employee Management and Cost Analysis 👩‍💼💸 R@32:Take care of your equipments -@255,293', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:36:10.480233', 'revision_id': 65, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@74:🎓  CRM R@136,137:

        🎓 Sales R@390:: Create detailed profiles for each piece of equipment, including specifications, usage history, and maintenance requirements. R@404,406:

      • - Track Progress: Monitor the status of maintenance requests in real-time, from creation to completion, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks. R@408,410:
      • - Integration with Employee Management: Link maintenance tasks to employee schedules, ensuring efficient allocation of resources. R@417:Maintenance', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:34:25.276515', 'revision_id': 64, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@400,402:
      • - Assign Personnel: Assign maintenance tasks to specific employees or teams, ensuring that the right person is handling the repair.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:33:01.381070', 'revision_id': 63, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@387,406:

        - **Define Equipment**: Create detailed profiles for each piece of equipment, including specifications, usage history, and maintenance requirements.

        - **Create Maintenance Requests**: Easily generate maintenance requests when equipment needs repair or servicing. These requests can be categorized and prioritized based on urgency.

        - **Calendar View**: View all maintenance requests in a calendar format to get a clear picture of scheduled and pending maintenance tasks.

        - **Assign Personnel**: Assign maintenance tasks to specific employees or teams, ensuring that the right person is handling the repair.

        - **Track Progress**: Monitor the status of maintenance requests in real-time, from creation to completion, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

        - **Integration with Employee Management**: Link maintenance tasks to employee schedules, ensuring efficient allocation of resources.


        ---


        By utilizing Odoo’s Maintenance app, you can ensure that all your equipment is well-maintained, reducing downtime and extending the lifespan of your assets. Simplify your maintenance processes with Odoo and keep your operations running smoothly!

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:32:56.938762', 'revision_id': 62, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@375,377:

        #### Equipment Definition and Maintenance Requests 🛠️🔧', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:31:15.980961', 'revision_id': 61, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@31,32 +@361:

        Take care of your equipments

        R@365,366:

        ### Streamlined Maintenance Management with Odoo: Optimize Your Equipment Upkeep

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:30:44.436026', 'revision_id': 60, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@360,406', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:30:28.656288', 'revision_id': 59, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@364,365', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:29:53.609381', 'revision_id': 58, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@357:        Employee -@359,360 -@363,365', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:18:43.291529', 'revision_id': 57, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@28:Appointment Scheduling R@332,352:

        - **Creating Employee Profiles**: Add detailed information about your employees, including their roles, contact information, and skills.

        - **Scheduling**: Plan and manage work schedules, ensuring that your team is always aware of their responsibilities.

        - **Leave Management**: Handle holiday requests and track leave balances effortlessly, ensuring that your business operations continue smoothly even during peak vacation seasons.

        - **Track Costs**: Monitor the costs associated with various resources, including employee wages and resource utilization.

        - **Analyze Performance**: Use detailed reports to analyze the performance and cost-effectiveness of different resources.

        R@356,358:

        ---

        +@360:

        By leveraging Odoo’s powerful tools, you ensure that every aspect of your resource management is covered, from employee schedules and resource allocation to cost tracking and online booking. Make the smart choice and optimize your appointment scheduling with Odoo today!

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:09:21.482235', 'revision_id': 56, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@28:        Efficient Resource Management with Odoo: Enhancing Your Appointment Scheduling R@258:

        Efficient Resource Management with Odoo: Enhancing Your Appointment Scheduling R@293,309:
      • Customize Availability**: Set availability for different resources, ensuring that your scheduling system is always up-to-date.
        +@311:

        - **Customize Availability**: Set availability for different resources, ensuring that your scheduling system is always up-to-date.

        - **Manage Subscriptions**: Offer paid and free courses depending on the user’s subscription status and set up automated billing for subscription services.

        - **Comprehensive Scheduling**: Plan and manage schedules, allowing customers to book appointments directly from your website, manage classes and sessions, and track attendance.

        - **Website Integration**: Seamlessly integrate all these features into your website, providing a unified experience for your customers to book appointments, view class schedules, and manage subscriptions online.

        -@318,319 R@327:

        At the core of any appointment scheduling system is effective employee management. With Odoo's `hr_employee` module, you can easily manage your staff's profiles, roles, and schedules. This includes:', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:07:10.802129', 'revision_id': 55, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@287,293:

      • Link to Courses**: Connect resources to specific courses that can be either free or paid, depending on the user’s subscription status. +@296:

        - **

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:02:03.976406', 'revision_id': 54, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@280,291:

        - **Add Resources**: Easily add resources like classes or coaches to your system.

        - **Link to Courses**: Connect resources to specific courses that can be either free or paid, depending on the user’s subscription status. -@302,306', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:01:48.487714', 'revision_id': 53, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@28,30:Appointment R@258:

        Appointment -@260,325', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T09:00:00.286159', 'revision_id': 52, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@27,28 -@256,257', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:59:02.625484', 'revision_id': 51, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@23,26 R@249:

        Resources management -@251,253', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:58:32.350056', 'revision_id': 50, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@245,246', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:58:20.140666', 'revision_id': 49, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@227,233 R@240:

        Setting up your online store is as easy as customizing a few settings. Go to the eCommerce app, choose your theme, and start adding your products. You can offer various payment options, manage shipping methods, and even set up automated marketing campaigns to boost your sales. With real-time inventory updates, your customers will always know what's available, enhancing their shopping experience. R@242:

        +@244:

        Integrating your POS with your website not only streamlines your operations but also provides a unified shopping experience for your customers. They can purchase products online and pick them up in-store, or vice versa, giving them the flexibility they need.


        In summary:


        1. **Effortless POS Management**: Set up and manage your POS with ease, track sales, and update inventory in real-time.

        2. **Seamless eCommerce Integration**: Link your POS to your website to manage online and offline sales from one place.

        3. **Customizable and Extendable**: Adjust pricing, manage vendors, and track margins with ease.

        4. **Enhanced Customer Experience**: Provide a unified shopping experience, whether customers are shopping online or in-store.


        🎓 Get Started Now


        Dive into the world of streamlined sales and inventory management with Odoo's integrated solutions. Set up your POS and eCommerce today, and watch your business thrive!

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:51:48.822035', 'revision_id': 48, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@221:

        Link your POS to your website for a seamless experience 🌐 +@225:

        But why stop at in-store sales? Easily extend your sales capabilities to your online store with Odoo's eCommerce app. Link your POS system to your website, allowing you to manage both online and offline sales from a single platform.

        R@227,228:

        🎓 eCommerce', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:50:49.170304', 'revision_id': 47, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@210:


         Point of Sale', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:49:47.118168', 'revision_id': 46, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@182:🎓 Purchase +@185:

        🎓 Purchase
        R@214,216:

        🎓 Point of Sale', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:49:35.072004', 'revision_id': 45, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@207,209:

        Effortlessly manage your Point of Sale 💵', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:48:37.190180', 'revision_id': 44, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@193,194 -@197,275', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:48:11.329652', 'revision_id': 43, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@188:🎓 Purchase', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:46:30.007356', 'revision_id': 42, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@186,189 -@192,194', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:45:23.814982', 'revision_id': 41, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@185:

        Efficiently manage your inventory and vendor relationships with ease!', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:45:11.968874', 'revision_id': 40, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': "R@176:

        Before starting the day, ensure you have enough stock. Confirming an order triggers the creation of a delivery in the Inventory app, where you can check the stock levels of each needed product.

        If stock levels are too low, resupply the items from the Purchase app by creating a purchase order linked to the right vendor. Easily manage all your preferred vendors in the Contact app and set reminders for minimum order amounts to benefit from free transport costs. R@178,179:

        For each ordered item, don't forget to fill in the analytic distribution to track which product will be used where.", 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:45:06.814965', 'revision_id': 39, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@168:

        Selling food and consumables at your fitness center? Automate your reordering process to ensure you never run out of stock. Choose from different vendors and add bulk pricing options, saving you time and hassle.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:44:48.264664', 'revision_id': 38, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@186,187', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:43:28.449215', 'revision_id': 37, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': "R@179,182:

        For each ordered material, don't forget to fill the analytic distribution in which you will be able to set for which project it will be used.

        ", 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:43:15.246940', 'revision_id': 36, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@176,177:

        If the stock levels are too low, resupply the materials from the Purchase app by creating a purchase order linked to the right vendor. In the Contact app, you can easily manage all your preferred vendors and don't hesitate to set a warning to remind if there is a minimum amount to get free transport costs.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:43:07.569541', 'revision_id': 35, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@168,169:

        Before starting the project, make sure you have enough stock. The confirmation of the quotation also triggers the creation of a delivery in the Inventory app where you can check the stock levels of each needed storable product.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:42:48.463506', 'revision_id': 34, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@135:

        Centralize all the important information 📝 -@137,139', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:42:36.743096', 'revision_id': 33, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@22:Keep an eye on materials 📦 R@160,163:

        Keep an eye on materials 📦 ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:42:25.279914', 'revision_id': 32, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@21,22 -@159,187', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:41:02.806139', 'revision_id': 31, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@135:

        Starting a construction project implies a lot of important documents such as contracts, building plans, instructions for use, subcontracting agreements, etc. Instead of scattering them in your emails, storage services or computer, attach them in the chatter and they will be automatically centralized in the R@137,138: app. ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:37:01.476035', 'revision_id': 30, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@19,20 +@133:
        +@134:


        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:36:17.657207', 'revision_id': 29, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@137,161', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:36:00.023238', 'revision_id': 28, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@131,132:

        Centralize all the impor', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:35:49.933489', 'revision_id': 27, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@131:

        Centralize all the important information 📝 R@133:

        Starting a construction project implies a lot of important documents such as contracts, building plans, instructions for use, subcontracting agreements, etc. Instead of scattering them in your emails, storage services or computer, attach them in the chatter and they will be automatically centralized in the Documents app.

        🎓 Documents

        Speed up the sign process thanks to the Sign app. Once again, all the signed documents will be stored in the Documents app.

        🎓 Sign', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:35:39.635182', 'revision_id': 26, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@131,155:

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:35:14.617766', 'revision_id': 25, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@122,124:

        🎓 Sales R@129,131:

        Streamline your operations and provide an exceptional experience for your fitness center members with our comprehensive solution. Get started today and elevate your business to new heights!', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:33:30.848096', 'revision_id': 24, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@60:CRM', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:33:04.207335', 'revision_id': 23, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@104:

      • The quotation in PDF format. ( You can custom it in settings/technical/ ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:32:42.888641', 'revision_id': 22, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@104:
      • The quotation in PDF format. ( You can custom it in ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:32:09.808430', 'revision_id': 21, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@104:
      • The quotation in PDF format.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:30:38.716932', 'revision_id': 20, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@88:

        Need to set up automated actions? No problem! Easily create activities when elements move from one stage to another (just click on the * icon and set up your automations). +@97:

        No VAT rate reductions needed here! Focus on providing top-notch services to your clients.


        R@103,108:

        - The quotation in PDF format.

        - A link to view the online quotation, where the customer can confirm and sign it.

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:23:06.636836', 'revision_id': 19, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@17,18 R@63,64:

        Easily manage your fitness center with our all-in-one solution! 💪

        -@66,129', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:21:37.076619', 'revision_id': 17, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@59,61:, ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:10:23.025294', 'revision_id': 16, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@59:', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:09:41.564799', 'revision_id': 15, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@58,59', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:09:10.563380', 'revision_id': 14, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@10,19:


        -@56,57', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:08:15.039454', 'revision_id': 13, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@48: app.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:07:31.575890', 'revision_id': 12, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@37:
      • The website app has a contact form that already redirects the people that fill the form directly to the CRM in the lead .', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:07:30.148666', 'revision_id': 11, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@37:
      • The website app has a contact form that already redirects the people that fill the form directly to the CRM in the lead.', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:07:16.153262', 'revision_id': 10, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@37:
      • The website app has a contact form that already redirects the ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:05:04.803370', 'revision_id': 9, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@37:
      • Use the Website app to create a contact form that will redirect all the requests to the CRM .', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:04:27.427522', 'revision_id': 8, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@30: info@my-construction-business.com', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:04:00.187887', 'revision_id': 7, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '+@8:


        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:03:15.154087', 'revision_id': 6, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@16,57', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:02:23.909519', 'revision_id': 5, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': '-@9,10 -@13,15', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T08:01:01.965261', 'revision_id': 4, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@3,5:

        This industry is tailor-made for fitness centers that excel in managing their operations. It encompasses the crucial stages of facility maintenance, efficient appointment scheduling, seamless subscription management, streamlined point-of-sale processes with products and stock management, flawless execution of fitness programs, effective collaboration with third-party vendors, meticulous budget follow-up, prompt invoicing, and exceptional customer service. Additionally, a well-designed website enhances the customer experience by providing easy access to class schedules, membership information, online booking, and e-commerce capabilities for fitness products. -@8,10', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T07:57:58.842834', 'revision_id': 3, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@3:

        ', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T07:54:49.949081', 'revision_id': 2, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}, {'patch': 'R@1:


        -@3,5', 'create_uid': 2, 'create_date': '2024-06-18T07:53:13.390217', 'revision_id': 1, 'create_user_name': 'Julien Schwanen (scju)'}]}

Fitness Industry

This industry is perfect for fitness centers that excel in managing their operations and offering a top-notch experience to their clients. From maintaining equipment and scheduling appointments to managing subscriptions and running a smooth point-of-sale system with products and stock management, everything is covered. 


Plus, you'll have a fantastic website and robust social marketing tools to attract new members and keep your community engaged. Whether it's planning fitness programs, collaborating with vendors, keeping an eye on the budget, handling invoicing, or delivering exceptional customer service, we've got you covered. Get ready to take your fitness business to the next level!

Fitness IndustryBusiness FlowsNever miss an opportunity 🎯Easily manage your fitness center with our all-in-one solution! 💪Keep an eye on your fitness center's inventory 📦Automate Your Reordering Process 🚀Customize and Monitor Your Inventory 📊Transition to Point of Sale and eCommerce 📈Invoice at the right time 📈Resources management Appointment Scheduling/ManagementTake care of your equipmentsBusiness expansion 🚀📈Marketing Campaigns


Business Flows

Never miss an opportunity 🎯

The CRM application allow you to collect the requests from your potential customers by aggregating several sources:

  • Create an opportunity each time you faced a potential customer, receive a phone call, etc.
  • Redirect the emails sent to info@my-fitness-business.com to the CRM .
  • The Website app has a contact form that already redirects the people that fill the form directly to the CRM in the lead tab.

Never miss nor forget an opportunity. The CRM centralizes everything and allows you to efficiently ensure the follow-up of each request. If the request becomes concrete, create the customer in the Contact app. 

🎓  CRM

Easily manage your fitness center with our all-in-one solution! 💪


Create Tailor-Made Subscriptions and Sell Products Effortlessly 🛒

At any time, create customized subscriptions for your members that clearly display pricing, discounts, and details of each:

  • Fitness classes and personal training sessions
  • Membership plans with different durations and benefits


Feel free to create all the needed products you often sell, such as supplements and workout gear. This will save you time for the next subscriptions.


If the customer replies to the email, the response is automatically logged in the chatter on the right of the screen. All discussions regarding the quotation, updates, and fine-tuning are attached, making it easy for all involved users to consult the history.


Once confirmed, the quotation becomes a sales order. All quotations and sales orders are centralized in the Sales app.


🎓 Sales


Keep an eye on your fitness center's inventory 📦

 

Keep an Eye on Your Fitness Center's Inventory 📦

Selling food and consumables at your fitness center? With Odoo, you can automate your reordering process, ensuring you never run out of stock. Here's how to make the most of Odoo's inventory management features:

Automate Your Reordering Process 🚀

  1. Set Up Automatic Reordering:
    • Navigate to the Inventory App: Go to the Inventory app in Odoo.
    • Create Reordering Rules: Click on the Products menu and select Reordering Rules. Here, you can set minimum and maximum quantities for each product to trigger automatic reordering.
    • Choose Your Vendors: Select the vendors you want to reorder from. You can also add bulk pricing options to save time and money.
  1. Check Stock Levels:
    • Confirm Orders: When an order is confirmed, a delivery is automatically created in the Inventory app. This allows you to keep track of stock levels and ensure you have enough inventory for your daily operations.
    • Resupply as Needed: If stock levels are low, create a purchase order from the Purchase app. Link it to the right vendor to ensure timely replenishment.

🎓Inventory

Customize and Monitor Your Inventory 📊

  1. Product Setup:
    • Navigate to the Product App: Go to the Product app and select the products you want to customize.
    • Set Up Pricing Rules: Adjust the pricing rules and margins to align with your business strategy.
    • Bulk Pricing: Add bulk pricing options for vendors and customer to save on large orders.
  1. Track:
    • Inventory Adjustments: Make inventory adjustments as needed. Go to the Inventory app and select Inventory Adjustments to update stock levels manually.

🎓Purchase

Transition to Point of Sale and eCommerce 📈


Now that we've covered inventory and vendor management, let's dive into how you can extend all of these features to your Point of Sale (POS) system and seamlessly link it to your website for a complete eCommerce solution.


Effortlessly manage your Point of Sale 💵


Of course, all of this functionality is extendable to your POS system. With Odoo's integrated POS app, you can set up a cash register, manage sales transactions, and track inventory in real-time. This means that as soon as a sale is made, your stock levels are updated automatically, ensuring you never run out of popular items.🎓Point of Sale


Setting up your POS system is a breeze. Simply navigate to the POS app, configure your cash register, and customize your product listings. The system supports various payment methods, making it convenient for your customers to complete their purchases. Plus, you can generate detailed sales reports to keep track of your daily, weekly, and monthly performance.



Effortlessly manage your eCommerce 💵


🎓 eCommerce


Setting up your online store is as easy as customizing a few settings. Go to the Website app, choose your theme, and start adding your products. You can offer various payment options, manage shipping methods, and even set up automated marketing campaigns to boost your sales. With real-time inventory updates, your customers will always know what's available, enhancing their shopping experience.


Invoice at the right time 📈

As the first invoicing step, create a down payment from the sales order. This will generate the first invoice in the Invoicing app. Then, schedule one or several "Invoicing Schedule" activities on the sales order with the aim to never forget to send an intermediary invoice in order to sustain your cash flow

Thanks to the invoicing policy that you can modify, the generated invoice is always the reflect of the reality on the field and it is fair for the customer.

🎓 Invoicing

Resources management 


Appointment Scheduling/Management


Managing appointments effectively requires a robust resource management system that can handle various elements seamlessly. Odoo offers comprehensive solutions for employee management, appointment scheduling, and resource allocation, ensuring your operations run smoothly. Let’s explore how Odoo manages appointment .


Appointment Scheduling and Resource Allocation 🗓️🏋️‍♂️


Odoo allows you to enhance your appointment scheduling by adding various resources such as classes and coaches. Whether you offer fitness classes, personal training sessions, or educational courses, you can:


  • Add Resources: Easily add resources like classes or coaches to your system.
  • Link to Courses: Connect resources to specific courses that can be either free or paid, depending on the user’s subscription status.
  • Customize Availability: Set availability for different resources, ensuring that your scheduling system is always up-to-date.
  • Comprehensive Scheduling: Plan and manage schedules, allowing customers to book appointments directly from your website, manage classes and sessions, and track attendance.
  • Website Integration: Seamlessly integrate all these features into your website, providing a unified experience for your customers to book appointments, view class schedules, and manage subscriptions online.


🎓Appointment


Take care of your equipments


Ensuring your equipment is always in top-notch condition is crucial for smooth operations. Odoo's Maintenance app provides a comprehensive solution for managing all your maintenance needs. From defining equipment to creating maintenance requests and assigning repair tasks, Odoo simplifies every aspect of maintenance management. Let’s dive into how Odoo can transform your maintenance processes.


Equipment Definition and Maintenance Requests 🛠️🔧


Managing maintenance effectively starts with having a clear overview of your equipment and its status. Odoo allows you to:


  • Define Equipment: Create detailed profiles for each piece of equipment, including specifications, usage history,emplacement,  and maintenance requirements.
  • Create Maintenance Requests: Easily generate maintenance requests when equipment needs repair or servicing. These requests can be categorized and prioritized based on urgency.
  • Assign Personnel: Assign maintenance tasks to specific employees or teams, ensuring that the right person is handling the repair.
  • Track Progress: Monitor the status of maintenance requests in real-time, from creation to completion, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.
  • Integration with Employee Management: Link maintenance tasks to employee schedules, ensuring efficient allocation of resources.


🎓Maintenance


Business expansion 🚀📈

Marketing Campaigns


Effective marketing is the key to attracting new customers and retaining existing ones. Odoo's suite of marketing tools allows you to create, manage, and analyze your marketing campaigns seamlessly. From social media integration to automated marketing flows, Odoo has everything you need to elevate your marketing strategy.


 Create and Manage Marketing Campaigns 📅📊


Odoo enables you to design and execute impactful marketing campaigns with ease. Here's how you can leverage Odoo's marketing capabilities:


  • Marketing Campaigns: Design comprehensive marketing campaigns that include email marketing, social media posts, and other outreach activities. Plan your campaigns in advance and track their performance in real-time.
  • New Posts: Create engaging content for your social media channels directly from Odoo. Schedule posts to be published at optimal times and ensure consistent engagement with your audience.
  • Email marketing: Create beautiful, responsive email templates with Odoo. Personalize your email content based on customer data. Use dynamic content blocks to tailor messages.
  • Analytics and Reports: Measure the success of your marketing efforts with detailed analytics and reports. Understand what works best for your audience and refine your strategies accordingly.


🎓Marketing

🎓Emailing
